task_objective: Clean Decky template leftovers and verify SDH-ludusavi uses a Decky-compatible plugin layout.
tests_added: tests/test_protocol.py Decky layout and template cleanup assertions
design_decisions: Use py_modules/sdh_ludusavi for Python backend code because Decky Loader adds plugin py_modules to sys.path.
Remove the template C backend, placeholder defaults, unused logo asset, and VS Code deployment scaffold because SDH-ludusavi does not use them.
Keep root Decky files and TypeScript frontend source required for building the plugin.
results: Moved Python backend modules into py_modules.
Updated local Python tooling to test and type-check py_modules.
Added static checks for Decky-required files and removed template-only paths.
